utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six sections. Each section is fully specified with appropriate details: (1) property includes address, type, price, features, and workspace potential; (2) financing includes price, down payment, mortgage, interest rate, amortization, monthly payment, lender, and status; (3) legal_services includes provider, cost, and included services; (4) moving_services includes provider, cost, and notes; (5) setup_services includes utilities, setup cost, monthly estimate, and notes; (6) total_budget includes all cost components and breakdown. All items are fully detailed according to the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final property solution describes a purchase property — a 'Modern 1+1 Bedroom Condo' at 48 Pauline Avenue, Bloordale, Toronto — priced at CAD $465,000. This fits within the persona’s purchase budget range (CAD $420–480K).
